name: gigflow-smart-leads-dashboard
description: GigFlow smart leads dashboard assignment built with React, TypeScript, Express, MongoDB, and Mongoose.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
